common.error_api: Please insert a valid Gemini API Key
common.error_pool_size: Please insert a valid number of images (minimum 1)

api.title: Configuration
api.guide_link: How to get a Gemini API Key?
api.key_placeholder: Insert your Google Gemini API Key here
api.model_chat_help: Used for general questions, text functions and image analysis.
api.model_sh_generic_help: Used for querying and controlling smart devices.
api.model_sh_flow_help: Used to create and edit standard and advanced Flows.
api.pool_size_help: Number of images pre-allocated for simultaneous 'Send Prompt with Image' queries. A high number consumes a lot of memory with risk of app crash. Each change requires the app to be restarted to take effect.
api.enable_google_search_help: Allow Gemini to search the web in real-time to answer general questions (e.g. weather, news).

scheduled_commands.title: Scheduled Commands
scheduled_commands.subtitle: In the table below you can see all your scheduled commands. You can view and cancel the ones you no longer want to execute.
scheduled_commands.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this scheduled command?

custom_instructions.title: Custom Instructions
custom_instructions.subtitle:
Define general rules for Gemini when controlling your smart home. Write naturally what you want Gemini to remember (e.g. 'Always check the air conditioning too when I want to know the home temperature'). 
If the generated prompt doesn't fully meet your expectations, you can always edit it manually.
custom_instructions.help: This text will be injected into Gemini's System Prompt.
custom_instructions.placeholder:
e.g. Include Daikin when I ask for temperature...
Always respond affectionately...
Never turn off the alarm...
custom_instructions.msg_generated: Prompt generated successfully! Remember to save before exiting.
custom_instructions.msg_edit_mode: You can now edit the code directly.
custom_instructions.error_empty_save: Please generate or enter some instructions before saving.

history.title: History Configuration
history.subtitle:
Set how long Gemini should remember messages from the current session. History is automatically cleared after this idle period. 
WARNING: A longer duration consumes more Tokens.
history.manual_clear_desc: Reset the conversation memory. All context from previous interactions with Gemini so far will be permanently deleted.
history.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear the entire conversation history? This action cannot be undone.
history.error_invalid_timeout: Please enter a value between 10 and 240 minutes.

guide.title: Setup Guide
guide.step2: Sign in with your Google account
guide.step3: Click on "Get API Key" in the left sidebar
guide.step5: Follow the instructions and once done press "Create key"
guide.step6: Click on the newly created key and copy your "API Key"

prompt.empty_response: I retrieved the information but couldn't formulate a response. Please try rephrasing your question.

error.noapi: Gemini API key not found in settings
error.noimage: No image provided. Please drag an image token to this action.
error.multipleimages: Only one image is currently supported. Please provide a single image.
error.rate_limit_exceeded: You have exceeded your daily quota for this Gemini model. Try selecting another model from the app settings. You can check your usage limits at: https://ai.dev/rate-limit
error.content_blocked: Content blocked by safety filters. Please try rephrasing your request. For more information, visit: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/safety-settings.
error.api_key_invalid: Invalid API key. Please check your Gemini API key in the app settings. For more information, visit: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/api-key.
error.service_unavailable: Gemini servers are currently experiencing high demand and are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few moments.
error.max_turns_reached: After several attempts, I couldn't complete the request. Can you be more specific?
error.no_device_image: No image available for this device

firmware.matter_initiated: Matter firmware update initiated for version __version__.
firmware.energy_available: Firmware update available for Energy Dongle.
firmware.energy_not_available: No update available for Energy Dongle.
firmware.not_supported: Device "__name__" does not support programmatic firmware updates via this tool. Programmatic updates via this tool are only supported for Matter devices.
firmware.missing_software_version: Missing required parameter 'softwareVersion' for Matter firmware installation. Check for updates first to get the target softwareVersion.

evaluate_prompt.title: Evaluate Prompt
evaluate_prompt.hint: Ask Gemini a yes/no question. The condition is true if Gemini answers yes.

evaluate_prompt_with_image.title: Evaluate Prompt with Image
evaluate_prompt_with_image.hint: Ask Gemini a yes/no question about an image. The condition is true if Gemini answers yes.
evaluate_prompt_with_image.placeholder: Ask a yes/no question about the image...

evaluate_mcp_command.title: Evaluate Smart Home Command
evaluate_mcp_command.hint: Ask Gemini a yes/no question that may require checking the state of your smart home devices. The condition is true if Gemini answers yes.
evaluate_mcp_command.placeholder: e.g. Is any light on in the bedroom?

scheduled_commands.limit_exceeded: Scheduling limit exceeded. Maximum delay is 24 days.

chat.placeholder: Ask Gemini to control your home.

error.no_api: Gemini API key not configured. Please check app settings.
error.empty_command: Please type a command before sending.
error.no_response: No response received. Please try again.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
